caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered top and a dark necklace, speaks against a solid dark gray background. She is centered in the frame, gesturing with her hands as she talks. In the early sequence, her hands are raised and slightly open, moving toward each other. As the sequence progresses, she continues to speak, with her left hand moving further outward and her right hand shifting position, eventually gesturing more broadly with both hands. A small, circular "NPTEL" logo is visible in the bottom-left corner of each scene. The lighting is consistent across the shots, highlighting her face and clothing against the muted backdrop, while her facial expressions and hand movements convey an active explanation.
